hero.title: Senior AI & Web Developer
hero.subtitle: Building intelligent systems and automated workflows with 10 years of experience.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: For over a decade, I've been immersed in the world of software development, specializing in creating intelligent, automated, and robust web systems. My journey has taken me from building scalable backend architectures to pioneering AI-driven solutions that solve real-world problems.
about.p2: My expertise lies at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, workflow automation, and full-stack web development. I'm passionate about writing clean, efficient code and architecting systems that are not only powerful but also maintainable and a joy to work with. I thrive on tackling complex challenges and turning innovative ideas into tangible, high-impact products.

skills.title: What I Do
skills.subtitle: My specialties to bring your ideas to life.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
ai.description: I create intelligent systems that learn, adapt, and automate. From complex data analysis to generative AI, I design solutions that drive efficiency and innovation.

web.title: Full-Stack Web Development
web.description: I build robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications from end to end. I handle everything from database architecture to creating intuitive and responsive user interfaces.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.description: I identify bottlenecks and automate repetitive manual processes, connecting different systems and services to create efficient and autonomous workflows that save time and reduce errors.

devops.title: DevOps & Deployment
devops.description: I ensure that applications are deployed and maintained efficiently and securely. I create CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, and guarantee the stability and scalability of systems.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to connect? Drop me a line.
contact.name: Name

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.message_min: Message must be at least 10 characters.
validation.success_message: Thank you for your message! I will get back to you soon.
